title: Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: The Bijapur District has officially announced the Rural Horticulture Extension Officer Recruitment 2026 with 8 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. 180 / स्थापना-डीएमएफ / ग्रा.उ.वि.अ.भर्ती / 2026-27 / बीजापुर. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 35 years and hold an Agriculture/Horticulture Graduate Degree can now submit their offline applications up to 15-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per rules for reserved categories.

selection_process: Academic Merit (80%) Experience (max 5 marks) Interview (15 marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bijapur District Rural Horticulture Extension Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: bijapur.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
